/usr/bin/clang++-15 -g -O0 -fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping -fpass-plugin=/usr/lib/mull-ir-frontend-15 -g -grecord-command-line -O0 -fno-inline -g -fprofile-instr-generate CMakeFiles/ConvexHullTests.dir/tests/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ConvexHullTests.dir/tests/test_comprassion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ConvexHullTests.dir/tests/test_graham.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ConvexHullTests.dir/tests/test_jarvis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ConvexHullTests.dir/tests/test_common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ConvexHullTests.dir/tests/test_mocks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ConvexHullTests.dir/ConvexHull.cpp.o -o ConvexHullTests  lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgmock.a -lpthread lib/libgtest.a
